---
name: typescript-interface
description: Generate a TypeScript interface from table definition front-matter
---

# `{{ spec.data.table.name | pascal }}.ts`

```ts
/**
 * {{ spec.data.table.description }}
 * @generated by Specifian / typescript-interface
 */
export interface {{ spec.data.table.name | pascal }} {
{{ for col in spec.data.table.columns }}  {{ col.name }}{{ col | optionalMark }}: {{ col.type | tsType }};
{{ end }}}
```
